category_summary:
Discussions today focused on computational creativity and open-ended evolutionary search algorithms. **Sakana AI** released a modern [AI Picbreeder experiment](/?date=2026-07-11&category=social#item-e1e3719f133e) combining classic algorithms with contemporary AI.

- **David Ha** announced the **AI Picbreeder Experiment**, [demonstrating interactive evolutionary art](/?date=2026-07-11&category=social#item-e1e3719f133e) generation
- Researchers explored [combining vision-language models](/?date=2026-07-11&category=social#item-84f58e507688) with **frontier LLM agents** for open-ended exploration and modeling human creativity
- Community members reflected on the history of neural network art, [referencing early systems](/?date=2026-07-11&category=social#item-663e26561764) like **CPPN-NEAT**
category_summary_html:
Discussions today focused on computational creativity and open-ended evolutionary search algorithms. Sakana AI released a modern AI Picbreeder experiment combining classic algorithms with contemporary AI.

  • David Ha announced the AI Picbreeder Experiment, demonstrating interactive evolutionary art generation
  • Researchers explored combining vision-language models with frontier LLM agents for open-ended exploration and modeling human creativity
  • Community members reflected on the history of neural network art, referencing early systems like CPPN-NEAT

themes.name: Open-Ended Exploration & AI Creativity
themes.description: Discussions and releases surrounding the use of modern vision-language models, agents, and historical concepts like Picbreeder to explore computational creativity and open-ended algorithms.

themes.name: Personal & Off-Topic
themes.description: Non-technical personal anecdotes and media shares.

items.title:
Today, things have come full circle.

We are now trying to use modern VLMs and frontier LLM agents w...
items.content:
Today, things have come full circle.

We are now trying to use modern VLMs and frontier LLM agents within open-ended exploration algorithms. We want to see if we can finally computationally derive the underlying mechanics of human creativity: serendipity, memory, exploration, and novelty search.
items.author: @hardmaru.bsky.social
items.summary: Discussion on integrating modern vision-language models and frontier LLM agents into open-ended exploration algorithms to model human creativity.
items.reasoning: Offers interesting conceptual insights into combining VLMs with evolutionary and open-ended search mechanisms.
items.summary_html: Discussion on integrating modern vision-language models and frontier LLM agents into open-ended exploration algorithms to model human creativity.
items.content_html:
Today, things have come full circle.

We are now trying to use modern VLMs and frontier LLM agents within open-ended exploration algorithms. We want to see if we can finally computationally derive the underlying mechanics of human creativity: serendipity, memory, exploration, and novelty search.

items.title: One of my first journeys in neural networks started over a decade ago with implementing CPPN-NEAT! B...
items.content: One of my first journeys in neural networks started over a decade ago with implementing CPPN-NEAT! Back then, I built a clone of ‘Picbreeder’ not only to study the mechanics of neural nets, but to explore the human creativity process itself, and generate some cool abstract art.
items.author: @hardmaru.bsky.social
items.summary: Historical reflection on early neural network experiments using CPPN-NEAT and Picbreeder to study abstract art and cognitive processes.
items.reasoning: Provides valuable historical context and personal background on the evolution of neural network art generation.
items.summary_html: Historical reflection on early neural network experiments using CPPN-NEAT and Picbreeder to study abstract art and cognitive processes.
items.content_html: One of my first journeys in neural networks started over a decade ago with implementing CPPN-NEAT! Back then, I built a clone of ‘Picbreeder’ not only to study the mechanics of neural nets, but to explore the human creativity process itself, and generate some cool abstract art.
